text:
{"fixed_xml":"<file name="line_13.json">
  <ITEM>
    In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgeliefert: 
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. 
      <EDITOR>Ant. Birrius</EDITOR>.
      <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    </BIBL>
    Ingleichen geben sie auch den 
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>T. Livium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Notit.</TITLE>
      in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median-Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
      <PRICE>fl. 6.</PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    künftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preis aber währet nur bis Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. nach welcher Zeit kein Exemplar unter <PRICE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRICE> verkaufft werden solle.
  </ITEM>
</file>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"1. Fixed Unicode escape sequences (e.g., \u221a\u00a7 to proper characters). 2. Added proper XML root tag <ITEM> to encapsulate the content. 3. Corrected the tag <PRIZE> to <PRICE> for semantic accuracy. 4. Fixed the misspelled tag <BIBL> closure and structure. 5. Changed <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR> to <EDITOR>Ant. Birrius</EDITOR> as it makes more sense in context. 6. Fixed the text 'Norit' to 'Notit.' for correctness. 7. Properly closed the <BIBL> tag for the second book entry. 8. Ensured all tags are properly nested and closed. 9. Corrected the term 'VOLUME' to 'VOLUME' tag consistency. 10. Fixed miscellaneous character encoding issues in the text."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<file name="line_13.json">
  <ITEM>
    In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgeliefert: 
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. 
      <EDITOR>Ant. Birrius</EDITOR>.
      <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    </BIBL>
    Ingleichen geben sie auch den 
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>T. Livium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Notit.</TITLE>
      in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median-Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
      <PRICE>fl. 6.</PRICE>
    </BIBL>
    künftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preis aber währet nur bis Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. nach welcher Zeit kein Exemplar unter <PRICE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRICE> verkaufft werden solle.
  </ITEM>
</file>
parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed Unicode escape sequences (e.g., \u221a\u00a7 to proper characters). 2. Added proper XML root tag <ITEM> to encapsulate the content. 3. Corrected the tag <PRIZE> to <PRICE> for semantic accuracy. 4. Fixed the misspelled tag <BIBL> closure and structure. 5. Changed <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR> to <EDITOR>Ant. Birrius</EDITOR> as it makes more sense in context. 6. Fixed the text 'Norit' to 'Notit.' for correctness. 7. Properly closed the <BIBL> tag for the second book entry. 8. Ensured all tags are properly nested and closed. 9. Corrected the term 'VOLUME' to 'VOLUME' tag consistency. 10. Fixed miscellaneous character encoding issues in the text.
